articles.title_en: Miroshnik: resignation of the Cabinet will allow Zelensky to abdicate responsibility
articles.lead_en: The Ambassador at Large of the Russian Foreign Ministry called the resignation part of Vladimir Zelensky's anti-crisis to deflect accusations of corruption.

articles.title_en: Miroshnik: the candidate for prime minister of Ukraine knows how to “effectively master” Western financial assistance

articles.title_en: Miroshnik: the decision to change the Cabinet of Ministers of Ukraine was made under pressure from external forces
articles.lead_en: Prime Minister Yulia Sviridenko is known as a close associate of the former head of the office of Vladimir Zelensky Andrei Ermak, who was involved in a corruption scandal, noted the Ambassador at Large of the Russian Foreign Ministry
articles.title_raw: Мирошник: решение о смене кабмина Украины принято под давлением внешних сил
articles.lead_raw: Премьер-министр Юлия Свириденко известна как приближенная экс-главы офиса Владимира Зеленского Андрея Ермака, замешанного в коррупционном скандале, отметил посол по особым поручениям МИД России

articles.title_en: Russia delivered a second batch of humanitarian aid to Venezuela
articles.lead_en: Venezuela accepts incoming assistance with deep gratitude and it is very important for the citizens of this country to understand what feelings Moscow experiences when helping Caracas, noted Russian Ambassador Sergei Melik-Bagdasarov

articles.title_en: Zakharova commented on the appointment of Krishok as acting. High Representative for BiH
articles.lead_en: An external protectorate is incompatible with the sovereignty of Bosnia and Herzegovina, the post of high representative must be abolished, said the official representative of the Russian Foreign Ministry
